sample_selection: ACS sample year derived from sample code in {2013, 2014, 2015, 2016}
Birthplace Mexico (bpl == 200) with Hispanic Mexican origin (hispan == 1 and hispand in {100,101,102,103,104,105,106,107,492,493,494,495,496})
Age 18-40 with positive person weight and non-missing usual hours and year of immigration
Citizenship status codes 3, 4, or 5 (noncitizen) to approximate the undocumented population targeted by DACA
Valid immigration history (age_at_immigration >= 0 and age_2012 >= 0) computed from sample and immigration years
